form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at The Gardens over 515m. Last start finished 3rd on April 2 over 515m at The Gardens behind Sahara Pearl beaten 3.5 lengths (30.09) in a Grade 5. Looks a strong winning hope.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off the heels shortly after the start and lost ground.

form.formComment: Failed to finish the race over 515m at this track on March 24. Capable of a strong show.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage eighth last time out over 520m at Wentworth Park. Prepared to risk.

form.formComment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest finishing third (23.25) at The Gardens. Drawn awkwardly. Looks tested in this line-up.

form.formComment: A speedy beginner who is back up to 515m which has been an issue in the past. Last appeared when fifth over 401m at Richmond 11 weeks ago. Tempted to look elsewhere.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Became awkward in actions rounding the home turn and lost ground.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Richmond over 520m. Can't recommend in this field.

formComments.comment: Has finished fourth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Richmond over 520m. Can't recommend in this field.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th over 520m at Wentworth Park beaten 7 lengths (30.31) behind Ritza Tears in a Grade 5 on April 4. Solid beginner who will take catching from out wide.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 4th over 520m at Wentworth Park beaten 7 lengths (30.31) behind Ritza Tears in a Grade 5 on April 4. Solid beginner who will take catching from out wide.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hind quarters contacted leaving the back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Ordinary effort last start when eighth over 320m at Richmond. Prior to that won by a nose at Richmond (18.19) beating Alphonse in a Grade 4/5 on March 29. Mixing her form but shapes as a genuine contender under these conditions.
